name: @vexa/gmeet-pipeline
description: The gmeet lane: channel-routed transcription. gmeet-capture.v1 (named per-channel audio) → transcript.v1 (named segments). Overlap-safe, names bound at capture — no diarizer.

scripts.build: tsc && rm -rf dist/hallucinations && cp -R src/hallucinations dist/hallucinations
scripts.test: tsx src/hallucination-filter.test.ts && tsx src/silence-gate.test.ts && tsx src/harvest-hallucinations.test.ts && tsx src/pipeline-conformance.test.ts && tsx src/fault-surfacing.test.ts && tsx src/confirm-loop.golden.test.ts && tsx src/count-channelswitch.test.ts && tsx src/pipeline-realstt.live.test.ts
